UNITED NATIONS - ORGANISATION DES NATIONS UNIES

No. 30032

CERTIFICATE of REGISTRATION

The SECRETARY-GENERAL of the UNITED NATIONS hereby certifies that the following international agreement registered with

in accordance with

Article 102 of

the Charter of

CERTIFICAT d'ENREGISTREMENT

Le SECRETAIRE GENERAL de T'ORGANISATION des NATIONS UNIES certifié par la présente ¡'Article 102 de la Charte des Nations Unies :

ao. 21971. FRANCE AND CYPRUS:

Convention for

evasion with respect

income and on capital (with protocol).

on 18 December 1981

Registered by France on 27 June 1983.

Signed at Nicosla

No 21971. FRANCE ET CHYPRE :

Coprevenin invasion scale matter amit surt de ficent te is decenbre gave protocole.

Signée à

UNITED
